customer_issue:
The customer is unable to log into the system.
The customer receives an 'internal server error' message when clicking the login button.
The customer is a high GMV seller and the login issue is impacting their orders.
summary: High GMV seller unable to log in, impacting order processing.
suggested_response: We understand the urgency since this is affecting your orders as a high GMV seller. Our team is prioritizing your case and will provide updates as soon as possible. Thank you for your patience.

policy.update_enforcement_reason: Detected a support issue that is not clearly urgent or critical.
